name: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 Linux 主机基线 (US Federal Information Systems)
description: NIST 800-53 R5 控制族适用于 Linux 主机的部分: AC/AU/IA/SC/SI

rules.title: AC-2 账户管理 — 默认账户禁用
rules.description: AC-2(c) Identify and disable account types not required

fix.command: for u in $(awk -F: '($2 == "") {print $1}' /etc/shadow); do passwd -l "$u"; done

rules.title: AC-11 会话锁定 15min
rules.description: AC-11(a) Initiate session lock after 15min idle

rules.title: AC-12 自动会话终止
rules.description: AC-12 idle 终止 SSH 会话

fix.command: cp /etc/ssh/sshd_config /etc/ssh/sshd_config.mxbak && (grep -qiE '^\s*#?\s*ClientAliveInterval' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sed -ri 's|^\s*#?\s*ClientAliveInterval.*|ClientAliveInterval 300|I' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'ClientAliveInterval 300' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config) && (grep -qiE '^\s*#?\s*ClientAliveCountMax' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sed -ri 's|^\s*#?\s*ClientAliveCountMax.*|ClientAliveCountMax 0|I' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'ClientAliveCountMax 0' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config) && (sshd -t || { mv /etc/ssh/sshd_config.mxbak /etc/ssh/sshd_config; exit 1; })

rules.title: AU-2 审计事件类型
rules.description: AU-2(d) Identify event types to audit (login/logout/account/system)

rules.title: AU-9 审计信息保护
rules.description: AU-9 审计日志文件权限 ≤600

fix.suggestion: /etc/audit/rules.d/audit.rules 添加 watch + syscall 规则

rules.title: IA-5 认证管理 — 密码复杂度
rules.description: IA-5(1) 密码复杂度: minlen 12 + 3 character class

fix.command: cp /etc/ssh/sshd_config /etc/ssh/sshd_config.mxbak && (grep -qiE '^\s*#?\s*PasswordAuthentication' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sed -ri 's|^\s*#?\s*PasswordAuthentication.*|PasswordAuthentication no|I' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'PasswordAuthentication no' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config) && (sshd -t || { mv /etc/ssh/sshd_config.mxbak /etc/ssh/sshd_config; exit 1; })

if systemctl list-unit-files firewalld.service 2>/dev/null | grep -q firewalld.service; then systemctl enable --now firewalld; elif command -v ufw >/dev/null 2>&1; then (ufw allow OpenSSH >/dev/null 2>&1 || ufw allow 22/tcp); ufw --force enable; else systemctl enable --now nftables; fi

rules.title: SC-8 传输保护
rules.description: SC-8 TLS 加密 — 禁明文协议

fix.suggestion: 禁用 telnet/rsh, 用 SSH 替代
fix.command: for s in telnet.socket rsh.socket; do systemctl disable --now "$s" 2>/dev/null; systemctl mask "$s" 2>/dev/null; done; true

rules.title: SI-2 漏洞修复 — 自动补丁

fix.suggestion: RHEL: dnf install dnf-automatic + systemctl enable --now dnf-automatic.timer
fix.command: if command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf install -y dnf-automatic && systemctl enable --now dnf-automatic.timer; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum install -y dnf-automatic && systemctl enable --now dnf-automatic.timer; elif command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y unattended-upgrades && systemctl enable --now unattended-upgrades; fi

if command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf install -y aide; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum install -y aide; elif command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y aide; fi && aide --init && (test -f /var/lib/aide/aide.db.new.gz && mv /var/lib/aide/aide.db.new.gz /var/lib/aide/aide.db.gz || true)
